new_classes.label_en: PDO wine (other than Tokaj), in containers > 2 l and ≤ 10 l — other (CN 2204 22 38)
new_classes.label_de: Wein mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung (g.U.), kein Tokaj, in Behältnissen > 2 l bis ≤ 10 l — anderer (KN 2204 22 38)
new_classes.definition_en: Still or semi-sparkling wine of fresh grapes (other than semi-sparkling wine of CN 2204 22 10) bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO), other than Tokaj, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres and not exceeding 10 litres (CN subheading 2204 22 38). The PDO must be recognised under EU wine regulations (additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22).

coverage_explanation: The primary distinguishing criteria from the legal text are captured: (1) PDO wine quality (via eucn:PDOWineQuality), (2) exclusion of Tokaj (complement of eucn:TokajOriginQuality), (3) container size > 2 l and ≤ 10 l (via eucn:MediumContainer2To10L), (4) exclusion of semi-sparkling wine (complement of eucn:SemiSparklingWineQuality — this CN code falls under "other" within 2204 22, excluding 2204 22 10 semi-sparkling), and (5) exclusion of sparkling wine (complement of eucn:SparklingWineQuality). The legal note references additional note 6(a) to Chapter 22 defining what constitutes a PDO wine; this definitional content is referenced semantically through eucn:PDOWineQuality but the full normative criteria of additional note 6(a) (e.g. specific EU wine regulation references, the precise list of recognised PDO names) cannot be fully encoded in OWL DL without a controlled vocabulary of PDO names, reducing coverage slightly. The sibling code 2204 22 26 (PDO wine medium container — labelled "other" in a prior subgroup) and 2204 22 33 (Tokaj medium container) are distinguished by the Tokaj exclusion and by sibling ordering; the exact internal subgroup structure (22042222–22042278 range) is noted but the "other" qualifier within the range is implicit from the complement restrictions.
